name: Will Ramsay

contactInfo.office: 200 N. Kaufman St., Suite 103, Mount Vernon, TX 75457

bio: Will Ramsay serves as the County Attorney for Franklin County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county government. He is dedicated to serving the residents of Mount Vernon and the surrounding community.
campaignPromises: Provide fair and effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Franklin County
Support victims and witnesses throughout the legal process
Maintain a fiscally responsible county attorney's office
Collaborate with law enforcement on community safety initiatives
